name: Patricia M. Vance
bio: Experienced family lawyer specializing in divorce mediation, child custody agreements, and estate planning with over 12 years of practice.

name: Marcus A. Thorne
bio: Expert legal counsel for tech startups and corporate scaling. Specializes in M&A, seed funding rounds, IP protection, and compliance.

name: Elena R. Rostova
bio: Dedicated criminal defense attorney handling state and federal trials. Committed to protecting constitutional rights and civil liberties.

name: Jonathan K. Sterling
bio: Specializes in commercial real estate acquisitions, zoning disputes, title clearing, and landlord-tenant litigation.

name: Sarah J. Jenkins
bio: Compassionate representation in domestic relations, adoption cases, prenuptial agreements, and guardianship laws.

name: David L. Vance
bio: Focuses on tax structuring, corporate governance, cross-border transactions, and contract drafting for multinational firms.

name: Chloe N. Dubois
bio: Assists buyers and sellers with residential real estate transactions, contract review, boundary lines, and HOA disputes.

name: Robert T. Fletcher
bio: Defending clients against major traffic violations, white-collar crimes, DUI/OUI, and misdemeanor charges.

name: Amina Al-Jamil
bio: Protecting digital assets, trademarks, copyrights, software licenses, and patent filings for artists and technologists.

name: Michael S. Brody
bio: Strong representation in personal injury claims, breach of contract lawsuits, and general civil disputes.

name: Sofia G. Bianchi
bio: Advises boards on ESG compliance, shareholder relations, internal investigations, and corporate restructuring.

name: Albert K. Sterling
bio: Specializes in zoning permissions, land redevelopment agreements, construction defects, and commercial leases.
